steps.title: Isolate the variable term
steps.content: Start with 6x + 5 = 47. Subtract 5 from both sides to get 6x = 42. This equation has the same solution set as the original since we performed a reversible operation.

steps.title: Match against the choices
steps.content:
• "$6x=42$": 6x = 42. This is exactly what we derived. Works.
  • "$6x=11$": 6x = 11 gives x = 11/6, while the original gives x = 7. Eliminated.
  • "$6x=5$": 6x = 5 gives x = 5/6, not 7. Eliminated.
  • "$6x=-42$": 6x = -42 gives x = -7, not 7. Eliminated.
That matches the correct answer — A is correct.
